scopeContract.rule: Every M37 queue row must be implemented or mapped-consumed exactly once.
scopeContract.runtimeBoundary: Work selection and participant choices remain in GameSession.work; rewards, body deltas, experience deltas, career flags, assignments, and turn advancement are committed to their save owners.
scopeContract.actionCoverageRule: ERB work feature rows are consumed by source-file/source-label work definitions and the common work execution pipeline.
